name: SCC_ContractAuthenticationRes
title: SCC_ContractAuthenticationRes
syntax: void SCC_ContractAuthenticationRes ( byte SessionID[], long ResponseCode )
description: The callback is called as soon as a Contract Authentication Response is received.
Further details that are transmitted in this response can be queried with

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
